title: chore(deps): update dependency ajv to ^8.18.0

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: chore(deps): bump ajv from 8.17.1 to 8.18.0 in /scripts/gh-issue-triage
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relevance: Previous dependabot bump of ajv to same version in a different scope (scripts/)

summary: Renovate bot PR that bumps ajv from ^8.17.1 to ^8.18.0 in @mastra/core (dependencies) and @mastra/schema-compat (devDependencies). Also includes incidental lockfile updates for @ast-grep/napi 0.41.0 → 0.41.1. Includes a changeset for @mastra/core. The PR is approved by github-actions bot, has no merge conflicts, and is mergeable. Two CI checks are failing (Full Test Suite, Observability Package Tests) and two are still pending (E2E Tests, Memory Tests), but these appear to be flaky/pre-existing failures unrelated to the ajv bump.
maintainerNotes: Straightforward patch-level dependency bump generated by Renovate. The ajv specifier already resolved to 8.18.0 in the lockfile previously; this just raises the minimum specifier. A prior dependabot PR (#13367) merged the same ajv version bump for scripts/gh-issue-triage. CI failures look unrelated—verify by checking if the same tests fail on main. Safe to merge once pending checks complete or are confirmed unrelated.
